title: The Prison Realm
description: The Prison Realm can trap players and Monsters.
body: **The Prison Realm is a powerful cursed artifact that allows you to banish living entities to a different dimension. Left-click (attack) any animal or player while holding the item to imprison them, teleporting them to a random location in a different dimension. There's a 2-minute cooldown between imprisonments. Right-click to release all imprisoned entities at once, bringing them back to your current location. Any imprisoned entities are automatically released after 5 minutes and teleported to the world spawn, preventing permanent trapping.****
